sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Sum haupa a innpha bel kongkhak kiangah,
Topa Pasian ta khat atu hi;
Leitungah gimna,
tawlna khempeuh a ngah,
A sih khit ciang a nuam bel ngah hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: A nopna sungah
vantung mite’n paipih,
Vankim lai-ah lasa aw dim hi,
Vantung inn nuam sungah Topa in la
hi,
A itte tawh nopna a ngah hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Gimna bei-in si leng, bang i piang ding
hiam?
Eimah in sin sungah ngaihsun ni;
Leitungah nuntakna vangik pua bang hi,
Dahna khitui
luannate om hi.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Jesuh nungzuite in sum a tawm hangin,
Vantung khua-ah om sum lamdang
hi;
Ze-et bawlsiatna teng i paisan ding hi,
Nungciang kikhel ding lungdamna
hi.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Topa ading hanciamin mainawt ciat ni,
I hun, i siamna i zangkhin
ding;
Nasepna a tawm hang za ngahna lian hi,
Singlamteh pua kham lukhu khu ding.
